name: Bryan Kamae School Trnsprtn

name: V & G Transportation
recent_news: No public news, M&A activity, or website found as of 2026. Listed as a school bus service at 284 17th Ave, Paterson NJ in Yellow Pages.
fit_notes: Small Paterson, NJ school transportation outfit; ~20 employees, ~$942K revenue, founded 2018. Not appearing on NJ DOE state contractor codes list; likely subcontracts to Paterson PS or a prime. Too small and too opaque to be a near-term Summit tuck-in; possible roll-up of multiple small Paterson contractors if grouped.

name: Michelle Davis Sch Bus
recent_news: No public news, web presence, or M&A activity found as of 2026.
fit_notes: Listed as a Portland, OR school bus business at residential address (4343 SW Primrose St); ~20 employees, ~$938K revenue, founded 2017. Almost certainly a sole-proprietor/owner-operator entity rather than a contracted yellow-bus operator. Low fit for Summit tuck-in; would need to verify it is more than a dba route holder.

name: A1 Elegant Sch Trans Logistic
owner_or_parent: Likely affiliated with A-1 Elegant Tours, Inc. (Shelim Khalique) - debarred
principals: Shelim Khalique (related A-1 Elegant Tours owner)
districts_or_customers: Historically Paterson, Jersey City, Passaic NJ schools (via A-1 Elegant Tours)
recent_news: A-1 Elegant Tours, Inc. (Paterson-based affiliate) pleaded guilty April 28, 2025 to contract fraud (hiring unqualified drivers, falsifying records) - paid $250K penalty and accepted 10-year debarment from NJ school transport contracts; owner Shelim Khalique personally debarred. Original charges filed June 2020; assets had been transferred to brother-owned bus company post-charges.
fit_notes: NOT a viable Summit tuck-in. Almost certainly tied to A-1 Elegant Tours / Eastern Star Transportation - subject of 2020 indictment and April 2025 guilty plea for contract fraud, with $250K penalty and 10-year NJ debarment. Severe regulatory, reputational, and safety risk. Asset-transfer pattern to related entities is a red flag. Avoid.

name: A & M School Transport Inc

fit_notes: Small Passaic, NJ school transportation entity at residential address (50 Kensington Ter); ~19 employees, ~$895K revenue, founded 2018. Limited tuck-in attractiveness on a standalone basis; could be of interest only as part of a Passaic/Paterson roll-up bundle.
